message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction

title "HashedTimelockERC20 contract: normal flow - receiver withdraws with preimage before the timelock expires"

subgraph EthereumNetwork
  <<Account>> Sender
  <<Account>> Receiver
  <<Smart Contract>> HashedTimelockERC20
  <<Smart Contract>> ERC20Contract
  Events
endsubgraph

subgraph HTLCState
  note over
    State stored for each HTLC:
    address sender;
    address receiver;
    address tokenContract;
    uint amount;
    bytes32 hashlock;
    uint timelock; // UNIX ts
    bool withdrawn;
    bool refunded;
    bytes32 preimage;
  end note
endsubgraph

Sender -> ERC20Contract: approve(htlc address, amount)
ERC20Contract -> Sender: newContract(
  receiver,
  hashlock,
  timelock,
  tokenContract,
  amount
)
Sender -> ERC20Contract: )
ERC20Contract -> ERC20Contract: transferFrom(sender, htlc address, amount)
ERC20Contract -> Events: LogHTLCERC20New(contractId, locks, values, etc.)
ERC20Contract -> Sender: contractId
Sender -> Sender: reveals contractId
Sender -> Receiver: knows/obtains secret preimage
  [sha256(secret preimage) == hashlock]
Receiver -> ERC20Contract: withdraw(contractId, secret preimage)
ERC20Contract -> ERC20Contract: transfer(receiver, amount)
ERC20Contract -> Events: LogHTLCERC20Withdraw(contractId)

@enduml
